name: Quest Complete
description: a triumphant little jingle marking a completed quest

ai.prompt: A quest completed: a short warm triumphant orchestral flourish with a bell/harp resolve, satisfying and rewarding. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
